Monday, July 6, 2026

Jul 6

Alfred E. Smith Recreation Center Summer Camp Extended Day

at Multi-Use Room (in Alfred E. Smith Recreation Center), Manhattan 

8:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
The NYC Parks Summer Day Camp program is an exciting chance for children ages 6 to 13 to have a fun-filled summer! Campers will engage in sports, fitness, and outdoor adventures, techno
Free!

at Multi-Use Room (in Alfred E. Smith Recreation Center), Manhattan

Free!

Tuesday, July 7, 2026

Jul 7

Summer Sports Experience: Pickleball

at Greenbelt Recreation Center (in Greenbelt Recreation Center), Staten Island 

7:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
The Summer Sports Experience program engages children in active outdoor play. An NYC Parks staff member leads free activities in NYC’s playgrounds
Free!

Jul 7

Foragers in the Foodway

at Concrete Plant Park, Bronx

10:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
Come outside and learn how to forage alongside NYC foragers and herbalists at the Bronx River Foodway!
Free!

Jul 7

Kids In Motion: Addabbo Playground

at Addabbo Playground (in Tudor Park), Queens

10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
Join NYC Parks staff in free activities in NYC's playgrounds, including organized sports, games, fitness demos, board games, water games, and more!
Free!
